content.en:
Next, Ye Tian's goal was not to survive in the Secret Realm, but to create the ultimate dimensional killing move.

However, he had never seen the ultimate dimensional killing move of the trick, and he had to have a reference to make it easier to create.

In short, the ultimate dimension killing moves of different systems cannot be used for reference, otherwise other ultimate dimensional killing moves will never be created.

When he came to the Mysterious Heaven and Earth this time, he had already blocked his memories of the two ultimate dimensional killing moves of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and he didn't remember it at all.

In this way, he can hope to create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Strange Realm.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to travel all over the world, and saw a lot of traces and inheritances of treacherous powerhouses, etc., and his strength naturally became stronger and stronger, and the more Tianjiao demons he encountered, the higher the tricky talent he obtained.

Before he knew it, he had completed fifteen spiritual transformations, and his talent had also been raised to the sixteen-star level.

It is worth mentioning that he learned a truth, that is, many terrifying and strange things are derived from the corpses of sophistic powerhouses, or simply sophistic powerhouses.

For example, a sophistication powerhouse with eighteen spiritual transformations tries to carry out spiritual transformation, and once he fails, he will go crazy and become a strange thing.

Such a strange thing is very terrifying, if no one in 947 stops it, it may even swallow countless treacherous powerhouses, causing endless killing.

It is precisely because of this that there are very few spiritual treacherous powerhouses in the Mysterious Realm Heaven and Earth, and even the seventeen spiritual transformations and eighteen spiritual transformations are very rare, far less than there are so many Shenwei Heaven and Earth.

According to Ye Tian's current strength, in the entire Strange Domain World, he is no longer a weak person.

"The most powerful thing in the Heaven and Earth is the Heavenly Domain, the Ghost Sacred Domain I am in now is still a little far away from the Heaven and Earth Domain, and after completing the seventeen spiritual transformations, let's go to the Heaven and Earth Domain!"

Ye Tian secretly decided.

He originally wanted to cultivate so calmly, but on this day, the people in the Ghost Sacred Domain were panicked, and many sophistication powerhouses were very afraid, and some of the sophistication powerhouses even ran away to other realms.

After Ye Tian inquired, he learned that the strongest person on the bright side of the Ghost Sacred Domain, the powerful man of the eighteen spiritual transformations, the Xuanming Jun, was about to impact the spiritual transformation realm.

What does this mean, many treacherous powerhouses know very well, if the Xuanying Monarch breaks through successfully, it will be enough, and there will be one more spiritual treacherous powerhouse.

But if the breakthrough fails, then there will be one more terrifying monster, and then the entire Ghost Sanctuary will suffer.

If there is no Spiritual Transformation Realm powerhouse to stop it, then the Ghost Sanctuary will be finished.

Therefore, these treacherous powerhouses are all panicking, for fear that the Xuanming Monarch will fail to break through!

In a small town.

Ye Tian was drinking tea, and several sophistication powerhouses with ten spiritual transformations were discussing the matter of Xuan Mingjun's impact on the spiritual transformation realm.

"Do you think Xuan Mingjun is crazy? He belongs to the ordinary kind in the eighteen spiritual transformations, and he has no backing behind him, so he dares to impact the spiritual transformation realm, isn't this looking for death?"

"Yes, it's just a matter of looking for death by ourselves, and forcing us to leave the Ghost Sanctuary immediately, but we can go, and our family can't evacuate for a while!"

"Let's be careful, don't let Xuan Mingjun know that we are talking about him behind our backs. "

"What are you afraid of, he is in Xuan Ming City, we are extremely far away from Xuan Ming City, can he still hear us talking?"

And at this moment, a strange force emerged, and it wiped out these people in an instant.

"Xuan Mingjun has made a move!"

The other treacherous powerhouses around him secretly said.

Only a group of sophistic powerhouses with extremely high cultivation know that Xuan Ming Jun has a special secret method of sophistication, which can spy on many places in the entire Ghost Sanctuary Domain, and whoever dares to say bad things about him, he can quickly lock down the location, so as to use means to kill him!

"This Xuanming Monarch is a little extraordinary!"

Ye Tian saw this scene and said secretly.

However, the other party is a little stingy and killing, that's for sure, otherwise who would be bored and keep spying on the entire Ghost Sanctuary!

(abcj）......

Xuanming City.

Xuan Mingjun was in a very bad state at the moment, and his spirit was very chaotic.

At this time, a woman stood beside him.

"Xuan Mingjun, you are in a very bad state, do you really want to impact the Spiritual Transformation Realm?" the woman said.

"If I don't hit the Spiritual Transformation Realm, I will still die. If the breakthrough is successful, my state will be restored after the mental transformation. "Xuan Mingjun said.

"I've already advised you, don't practice that secret art, you just won't listen. The woman shook her head.

"Hahaha, if I didn't practice that secret technique, how would I have completed the eighteen spiritual transformations? Xuanzhen, I need you to help me, if I fail to break through, you will take all my heirs away. Xuan Mingjun pleaded.

"You're worried you're going to be weird, and if so, you might as well break through somewhere else. Xuanyu said.

"No, I have offended too many strong people, and it is too dangerous to break through in other places, at least Xuanyin City has the spiritual domain field and many backhands that I have arranged, and those enemies dare not kill them. Besides, no matter where I go to break through, if I fail, my children will be hunted down. So, you must be asked to take them away. "

"Of course, if I succeed in breaking through, all crises will be solved!"

Xuan Ming Jun said.

"Damn, dare to scold me again!" Xuan Mingjun suddenly made another move, killing a group of sophistication powerhouses who dared to curse him.

Seeing this, Xuan Yu shook his head.

She and Xuan Ming used to be the best friends, and it was a catastrophe of life and death, she had been in danger many times, and it was Xuan Ming Jun who helped her through the catastrophe.

That's why she is willing to help Xuan Mingjun.

But Xuan Mingjun's situation, she can't solve it.

Shortly thereafter.

Xuan Mingjun began to officially impact the Spiritual Transformation Realm.

Many sophistic powerhouses in the outside world also knew about it, and they were waiting for the situation of Xuanming Jun, but not far from Xuanming City, there were no powerful sophistication powerhouses anymore, and everyone ran far away.

Another period of time passed.

this day.

Xuan Netherworld City instantly turned into powder, and a terrifying monster phantom appeared.

"It's Xuan Mingjun, he failed to break through!"

Many treacherous powerhouses fled one after another, trying to escape from the Ghost Sanctuary.

At the same time, a figure escaped from the Ghost Sanctuary with a group of people, and this person was Xuanyu.

"Kill Kill Kill !!!!"

Xuan Mingjun began to slaughter the living beings around him frantically, and the cities were reduced to pieces, and countless living beings were devoured.

"This is the end of the breakthrough failure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He left quickly, and he didn't dare to fight with Xuan Mingjun, he was far from being the opponent of the other party.
